title: Educational Institution
description: Schools, colleges, universities, and other educational organizations

title: Rancho
description: Spanish and Mexican land grant rancho — formal legal entity with deeded land

title: Mission
description: Spanish Catholic mission — religious and colonial administrative institution

title: Government
description: Government bodies — city, county, state, federal agencies and offices

title: Nonprofit
description: Nonprofit organizations, foundations, and civic associations

title: Media
description: Newspapers, television stations, radio stations, and media organizations

title: Military Unit
description: Formal military organizations — regiments, battalions, companies

title: Religious Institution
description: Churches, parishes, synagogues, and religious organizations
